ep_ai_mcp.access_denied: Access denied: AI cannot access this pad

ep_ai_mcp.unauthorized: Unauthorized: valid API key or JWT required
ep_ai_mcp.findtext_required: findText is required for replace action
ep_ai_mcp.tool_get_pad_authorship: Get per-paragraph author attribution for current text
ep_ai_mcp.tool_get_text_provenance: Get full edit history for specific text in a pad
ep_ai_mcp.tool_get_pad_contributors: Get contribution statistics for all authors
ep_ai_mcp.tool_get_pad_activity: Get timeline of changes to a pad

ep_ai_mcp.tool_get_pad_html: Get current HTML content of a pad
ep_ai_mcp.tool_search_pads: Search for pads containing specific text
ep_ai_mcp.tool_create_pad: Create a new pad with optional initial content
ep_ai_mcp.tool_get_chat_history: Get chat messages from a pad
ep_ai_mcp.tool_send_chat_message: Send a chat message to a pad
ep_ai_mcp.tool_list_pads: List all pad IDs the AI has access to
